Chronology of every recorded fact about [[King Zakareth VI]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — The current reign is the 24th year of King Zakareth VI.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 1''' — King Zakareth VI is the King of Damasca.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — King Zakareth's throne is carved from one enormous ruby with its shape outlined in gold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — King Zakareth is Leah's father.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — King Zakareth has a bright blue right eye and his left eye was replaced by a bright red stone from the Crimson Vault.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — King Zakareth wears a black-and-gold peaked crown set with a huge ruby.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — King Zakareth has a crimson eye that blazes like a star.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — King Zakareth has a Vault containing a wand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — King Zakareth has not yet named a Successor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — King Zakareth plans to scour Territory outposts and then attack the city in full force.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — King Zakareth has white hair and a beard, a glowing red eye, and armor of black and gold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Zakareth is a King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — King Zakareth has one blue eye and eyes that blaze red and ice-cold blue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — King Zakareth claims Simon is a wanted criminal in his lands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — King Zakareth accuses Simon of killing fifty-three of his subjects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — King Zakareth is a figure Alin imagines speaking like a king.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — King Zakareth has one human eye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 17''' — King Zakareth arrayed an enormous army against his enemies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — King Zakareth wears armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — King Zakareth wears a crown with a ruby on the front.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — King Zakareth has a blue eye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — King Zakareth is known as the Evening Star.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — King Zakareth is the father of Heir Talos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — King Zakareth's throne room doors are etched with a nine-pointed star and a bright red eye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — King Zakareth is resting against the throne.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — King Zakareth sits on a ruby throne in Damasca.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 20''' — King Zakareth brought up a black-and-gold shield from his Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 20''' — King Zakareth has a throne room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — King Zakareth stands on the walls of Cana watching the destruction.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — King Zakareth spoke about slipping the muzzle back over his hound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Ornheim and Indirial need to reach King Zakareth so he can seal the Fangs in the Vault.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — King Zakareth is mentioned in relation to a setup with the Endross Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — King Zakareth's real plans are unknown to the group.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — King Zakareth has patterns on his skin that shine red and gold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Alin blasted King Zakareth with Gold Light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Alin killed King Zakareth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — King Zakareth was surprised by Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — King Zakareth wields the crimson Ragnarus blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — King Zakareth is the Ragnarus Incarnation.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
